description_long: This television features a large, flat rectangular display with a thin, nearly bezel-less design, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The screen is supported by a wide, low-profile base that appears to double as a soundbar or integrated stand, finished in a light gray color. The front of the television is dominated by the expansive screen, which has a subtle reflective quality, suggesting a glass or high-gloss plastic surface. The back panel is solid and dark, likely made of plastic or metal, providing structural support and housing internal components. The side views reveal the television's ultra-slim profile, with the screen panel being exceptionally thin compared to the base. This design is typical of contemporary high-end televisions intended for living rooms, public spaces, or commercial environments.
description: A modern, ultra-slim television with a large flat screen and a wide, light gray base, featuring a minimalist bezel and sleek design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, light gray base and the dark, flat screen surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the screen and the depth of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid dark back panel and the full width of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the thinness of the screen and the sturdy base.
attribute_bezel_design: ultra-thin, black, minimalistic bezel with a sleek finish
